raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track continues southward with a slight leftward correction needed (delta +9.27°), so applying small left steering at full speed to follow the waypoint line.
knowledge: Track curves sharply south near waypoints 91-100 (x decreasing, y decreasing)
Heading must swing from -94° toward -85° to follow track southward
Positive delta means steer left (positive steering_angle)
At delta ~9°, use speed=1.5 and steering=+5° to gently correct
Car is slightly left of center — acceptable, follow waypoints not center
Track width 0.76m — narrow, maintain control through turn
After sharp right turn, waypoints continue south then loop back east
Avoid overcorrecting — once delta < 5°, reduce steering to 0°
Car is progressing through turn section (~80% progress)
all_wheels_on_track=true — car is stable on track
